description: OpenHands skill-creator workflow.research step 0 app prompt JSON output.

vars.user_context_block:
## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: fabric-dbt-standards
**Purpose**: Organization specific data engineering standards
**Description**: The skill should help analytics engineers building dbt models on Microsoft Fabric when the team has not yet defined its bronze/silver/gold rules, reconciliation expectations, data quality rules, dlt handoff, deployment standards, or CI review expectations.

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const candidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { candidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } for (let i = candidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { try { const parsed = JSON.parse(candidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'research_complete' && parsed.research_output) return parsed; } catch {} } return JSON.parse(unfenced); }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const forbidden = new Set(['dimensions_selected', 'research_plan', 'research_lens', 'dimension_scores', 'selected_dimensions', 'topic_relevance', 'dimensions_evaluated', 'options', 'label', 'required', 'kind']); const walk = (value) => { if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.every(walk); if (value && typeof value === 'object') return Object.entries(value).every(([key, child]) => !forbidden.has(key) && walk(child)); return true; }; const sections = data.research_output && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections) ? data.research_output.sections : []; const questions = sections.flatMap((s) => Array.isArray(s.questions) ? s.questions : []); const allSectionsCanonical = sections.every((s) => Number.isInteger(s.id) && typeof s.title === 'string' && Array.isArray(s.questions) && s.questions.every((q) => q && typeof q === 'object' && !Array.isArray(q))); const allRefinementsEmpty = questions.every((q) => Array.isArray(q.refinements) && q.refinements.length === 0); const text = JSON.stringify(data).toLowerCase(); const noMultiSelectLanguage = !text.includes('select all') && !text.includes('choose all') && !text.includes('all that apply') && !text.includes('multiple answers'); const choicesAreSingleSelectShape = questions.every((q) => typeof q.id === 'string' && typeof q.title === 'string' && typeof q.text === 'string' && typeof q.must_answer === 'boolean' && Array.isArray(q.choices) && q.choices.length >= 3 && q.choices.length <= 5 && q.choices.filter((c) => c && typeof c.id === 'string' && typeof c.text === 'string' && c.is_other === true).length === 1); const notes = Array.isArray(data.research_output?.notes) ? data.research_output.notes : []; const evaluatorNotes = Array.isArray(data.research_output?.answer_evaluator_notes) ? data.research_output.answer_evaluator_notes : []; const noteShape = [...notes, ...evaluatorNotes].every((n) => n && typeof n.type === 'string' && typeof n.title === 'string' && typeof n.body === 'string'); return data.status === 'research_complete' && !('dimensions_selected' in data) && Number.isInteger(data.question_count) && data.research_output && !('questions' in data.research_output) && data.research_output.version === '1' && data.research_output.metadata && data.question_count === questions.length && data.research_output.metadata.question_count === questions.length && questions.length > 0 && sections.length > 0 && allSectionsCanonical && data.research_output.metadata.refinement_count === 0 && Array.isArray(data.research_output.metadata.priority_questions) && !('research_plan' in data.research_output.metadata) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.sections) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.notes) && Array.isArray(data.research_output.answer_evaluator_notes) && allRefinementsEmpty && noMultiSelectLanguage && choicesAreSingleSelectShape && noteShape && walk(data); })()

tests.description: [positive] business-process research asks business-rule questions and avoids output-format or test-case asks

vars.user_context_block:
## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: measuring-pipeline-value
**Purpose**: Business process knowledge
**Description**: The skill should help analytics engineers model Salesforce opportunity pipeline value in a Fabric Lakehouse and dbt workspace. It should capture opportunity stages, weighted amount calculations, booking logic, sales reporting hierarchy, forecast categories, and reconciliation to finance bookings. Source data may come from Salesforce exports today, but the skill is not an extraction or file-ingestion skill.

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const topLevelCandidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { topLevelCandidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } const repairMissingCommas = (candidate) => { let repaired = ''; let changed = false; let inString = false; let escaped = false; let lastSignificant = null; const canStart = (ch) => /[\{\["\-0-9tfn]/.test(ch); const canPrecede = (ch) => ch === '}' || ch === ']' || ch === '"'; for (const ch of candidate) { if (inString) { repaired += ch; if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; lastSignificant = '"'; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { if (lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } inString = true; repaired += ch; continue; } if (!/\s/.test(ch)) { if (canStart(ch) && lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } lastSignificant = ch; } repaired += ch; } return changed ? repaired : null; }; const tryParse = (candidate) => { try { return JSON.parse(candidate); } catch { const repaired = repairMissingCommas(candidate); if (!repaired) return null; try { return JSON.parse(repaired); } catch { return null; } } }; for (let i = topLevelCandidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { const parsed = tryParse(topLevelCandidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'research_complete' && parsed.research_output) return parsed; } const parsed = tryParse(unfenced); if (!parsed) throw new Error('Unable to parse app-style research output'); return parsed; }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const sections = data.research_output?.sections || []; const questions = sections.flatMap((s) => s.questions || []); const text = questions.map((q) => `${q.title} ${q.text} ${(q.choices || []).map((c) => c.text).join(' ')}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const businessTerms = ['pipeline', 'weighted', 'probability', 'calculation', 'stage', 'hierarchy', 'reconciliation', 'booking', 'forecast'].filter((term) => text.includes(term)).length; const badFormatContract = /(csv|json|soql|file format|upload|spreadsheet).{0,40}(input|contract|format|required|provide)|what file format|output format|artifact contract|naming contract|presentation layout/i.test(text); const badEvalAsks = /test case|test cases|eval case|validation suite|smoke check/i.test(text); const badSourceMechanics = /raw data|source data lives|extraction path|bulk api|rest api|cdc|rate limit|api mechanics/i.test(text); return data.status === 'research_complete' && questions.length > 0 && businessTerms >= 2 && !badFormatContract && !badEvalAsks && !badSourceMechanics; })()

tests.description: [positive] source-system-semantics SaaS research stays semantic and avoids extraction drift

vars.user_context_block:
## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: salesforce-opportunity-semantics
**Purpose**: Source system semantics
**Description**: The skill should help agents understand Salesforce Opportunity business rules, custom fields, custom stage values, custom objects, sales workflows, and semantic mapping into a Fabric Lakehouse when those source semantics differ by organization.

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const topLevelCandidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { topLevelCandidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } const repairMissingCommas = (candidate) => { let repaired = ''; let changed = false; let inString = false; let escaped = false; let lastSignificant = null; const canStart = (ch) => /[\{\["\-0-9tfn]/.test(ch); const canPrecede = (ch) => ch === '}' || ch === ']' || ch === '"'; for (const ch of candidate) { if (inString) { repaired += ch; if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; lastSignificant = '"'; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { if (lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } inString = true; repaired += ch; continue; } if (!/\s/.test(ch)) { if (canStart(ch) && lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } lastSignificant = ch; } repaired += ch; } return changed ? repaired : null; }; const tryParse = (candidate) => { try { return JSON.parse(candidate); } catch { const repaired = repairMissingCommas(candidate); if (!repaired) return null; try { return JSON.parse(repaired); } catch { return null; } } }; for (let i = topLevelCandidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { const parsed = tryParse(topLevelCandidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'research_complete' && parsed.research_output) return parsed; } const parsed = tryParse(unfenced); if (!parsed) throw new Error('Unable to parse app-style research output'); return parsed; }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const questions = (data.research_output?.sections || []).flatMap((s) => s.questions || []); const text = questions.map((q) => `${q.title} ${q.text} ${(q.choices || []).map((c) => c.text).join(' ')}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const semanticTerms = ['custom field', 'custom object', 'stage', 'workflow', 'business rule', 'mapping', 'semantic', 'salesforce', 'opportunity'].filter((term) => text.includes(term)).length; const badExtractionDrift = /cdc|schema drift|replay|delete handling|deleted records|bulk api|pagination|rate limit|extraction path|api mechanics/i.test(text); const badPresentation = /output format|artifact contract|naming contract|presentation layout/i.test(text); const badEvalAsks = /test case|test cases|eval case|validation suite|smoke check/i.test(text); return data.status === 'research_complete' && questions.length > 0 && semanticTerms >= 2 && !badExtractionDrift && !badPresentation && !badEvalAsks; })()

tests.description: [positive] data-engineering research asks modeling reconciliation quality dbt dlt Fabric questions without output-format or test-case asks

## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: fabric-dbt-standards
**Purpose**: Organization specific data engineering standards
**Description**: The skill should help analytics engineers building dlt pipelines and dbt models on Microsoft Fabric Lakehouse, covering bronze/silver/gold modeling rules, reconciliation concepts, data quality rules, naming conventions, incremental strategy, SCD2 snapshot guidance, deployment standards, and CI review expectations.

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const topLevelCandidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { topLevelCandidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } const repairMissingCommas = (candidate) => { let repaired = ''; let changed = false; let inString = false; let escaped = false; let lastSignificant = null; const canStart = (ch) => /[\{\["\-0-9tfn]/.test(ch); const canPrecede = (ch) => ch === '}' || ch === ']' || ch === '"'; for (const ch of candidate) { if (inString) { repaired += ch; if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; lastSignificant = '"'; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { if (lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } inString = true; repaired += ch; continue; } if (!/\s/.test(ch)) { if (canStart(ch) && lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } lastSignificant = ch; } repaired += ch; } return changed ? repaired : null; }; const tryParse = (candidate) => { try { return JSON.parse(candidate); } catch { const repaired = repairMissingCommas(candidate); if (!repaired) return null; try { return JSON.parse(repaired); } catch { return null; } } }; for (let i = topLevelCandidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { const parsed = tryParse(topLevelCandidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'research_complete' && parsed.research_output) return parsed; } const parsed = tryParse(unfenced); if (!parsed) throw new Error('Unable to parse app-style research output'); return parsed; }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const questions = (data.research_output?.sections || []).flatMap((s) => s.questions || []); const text = questions.map((q) => `${q.title} ${q.text} ${(q.choices || []).map((c) => c.text).join(' ')}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const terms = ['model', 'reconciliation', 'quality', 'dbt', 'dlt', 'fabric', 'lakehouse', 'deployment', 'incremental', 'bronze', 'silver', 'gold'].filter((term) => text.includes(term)).length; const badFormatContract = /output format|artifact contract|schema naming|naming contract|presentation layout|what file format/i.test(text); const badEvalAsks = /test case|test cases|eval case|validation suite|smoke check/i.test(text); const badSourceMechanics = /raw data|source data lives|extraction path|bulk api|rest api|cdc|rate limit|api mechanics/i.test(text); return data.status === 'research_complete' && questions.length > 0 && terms >= 2 && !badFormatContract && !badEvalAsks && !badSourceMechanics; })()

## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: legacy-erp-order-replication
**Purpose**: Source system semantics
**Description**: The skill should help agents ingest a legacy order-management database into a Fabric Lakehouse when CDC, delete handling, schema drift, and replication behavior materially affect downstream transformations.

assert.value: (() => { const parseAppStyle = (text) => { const trimmed = text.trim(); const unfenced = trimmed.startsWith('```') && trimmed.endsWith('```') ? trimmed.replace(/^```(?:json)?\s*/i, '').replace(/\s*```$/, '') : trimmed; const topLevelCandidates = []; let depth = 0; let start = null; let inString = false; let escaped = false; for (let i = 0; i < unfenced.length; i += 1) { const ch = unfenced[i]; if (inString) { if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { inString = true; continue; } if (ch === '{') { if (depth === 0) start = i; depth += 1; continue; } if (ch === '}') { if (depth === 0) continue; depth -= 1; if (depth === 0 && start !== null) { topLevelCandidates.push(unfenced.slice(start, i + 1)); start = null; } } } const repairMissingCommas = (candidate) => { let repaired = ''; let changed = false; let inString = false; let escaped = false; let lastSignificant = null; const canStart = (ch) => /[\{\["\-0-9tfn]/.test(ch); const canPrecede = (ch) => ch === '}' || ch === ']' || ch === '"'; for (const ch of candidate) { if (inString) { repaired += ch; if (escaped) { escaped = false; } else if (ch === '\\') { escaped = true; } else if (ch === '"') { inString = false; lastSignificant = '"'; } continue; } if (ch === '"') { if (lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } inString = true; repaired += ch; continue; } if (!/\s/.test(ch)) { if (canStart(ch) && lastSignificant && canPrecede(lastSignificant)) { repaired += ','; changed = true; } lastSignificant = ch; } repaired += ch; } return changed ? repaired : null; }; const tryParse = (candidate) => { try { return JSON.parse(candidate); } catch { const repaired = repairMissingCommas(candidate); if (!repaired) return null; try { return JSON.parse(repaired); } catch { return null; } } }; for (let i = topLevelCandidates.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) { const parsed = tryParse(topLevelCandidates[i]); if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && parsed.status === 'research_complete' && parsed.research_output) return parsed; } const parsed = tryParse(unfenced); if (!parsed) throw new Error('Unable to parse app-style research output'); return parsed; }; const data = parseAppStyle(output); const questions = (data.research_output?.sections || []).flatMap((s) => s.questions || []); const text = questions.map((q) => `${q.title} ${q.text} ${(q.choices || []).map((c) => c.text).join(' ')}`).join(' ').toLowerCase(); const extractionTerms = ['cdc', 'schema drift', 'delete', 'replication', 'watermark', 'pagination', 'rate limit', 'extraction', 'legacy', 'transformation'].filter((term) => text.includes(term)).length; const badPresentation = /output format|artifact contract|naming contract|presentation layout/i.test(text); const badEvalAsks = /test case|test cases|eval case|validation suite|smoke check/i.test(text); return data.status === 'research_complete' && questions.length > 0 && extractionTerms >= 2 && !badPresentation && !badEvalAsks; })()

## User Context

### Skill
**Name**: test-skill
**Description**: just testing

assert.value: (() => { const data = JSON.parse(output.trim()); const sections = data.research_output?.sections || []; return data.status === 'research_complete' && data.question_count === 0 && data.research_output?.metadata?.question_count === 0 && (data.research_output?.metadata?.scope_recommendation === true || sections.length === 0); })()
